evidence.text: I would like to tie human approvals to a github review
Implement on a new feature branch

evidence.title: Implement GitHub review backed human approvals for Agentic SDLC gates
users: repository maintainers administering Agentic SDLC lifecycle gates
human approvers whose decisions must bind to durable GitHub review evidence
independent reviewers validating authority separation and gate readiness
desired_outcomes: Human lifecycle approvals can be recorded from GitHub PR review evidence.
Projects can require GitHub-review-backed approvals while optionally preserving manual fallback for historical runs.
Gate progression remains traceable and automatically advances when approvals complete a ready gate.
in_scope: Portable Agentic SDLC CLI support for recording approvals from GitHub review metadata.
Validation rules for approval-source policy, GitHub reviewer identity matching, and evidence URI structure.
Repository overlay defaults and authority bindings needed to adopt GitHub review approvals.
Regression tests and documentation for the new approval flow.
out_of_scope: Live GitHub API retrieval or enforcement of remote PR state beyond provided review metadata.
Rewriting historical approval evidence for prior July 24, 2026 runs.
Production deployment, persistent environment mutation, or release authorization changes.
constraints: Maintain separation of duties between artifact preparers, independent reviewers, and human approvers.
Preserve repository validity for existing historical run records while moving the default approval path toward GitHub review evidence.
Keep the implementation portable and standard-library based within the plugin CLI.
Bind decisions to exact source revision 5de2fb68f97758580a68a56927fede99af86c501 and PR #7.

assumptions: A portable first increment can rely on explicit GitHub review metadata supplied to the CLI without adding a network dependency.
This repository should prefer GitHub-review-backed approvals going forward but keep manual fallback enabled until historical records are migrated or superseded.
conflicts_or_open_decisions: Whether future iterations should fetch and verify GitHub review state directly through the GitHub API or gh CLI remains a later design decision.

measurable_success_criteria: The plugin exposes a command that records GitHub review metadata as human approval evidence for a lifecycle gate.
Validation rejects strict GitHub-review approval policies when approval evidence is missing or reviewer identity does not match the assigned authority.
The repository validates successfully on Friday, July 24, 2026 after adopting GitHub-review defaults with backward-compatible fallback.
Automated tests cover approval recording, strict-policy rejection, and reviewer-identity mismatch cases.
